metadata.description: Claude Code Dev Studio — domain-agent + skills playbook as native plugins. One plugin per archetype pack.

plugins.name: ccds-core
plugins.description: Claude Code Dev Studio core: 5 generalist agents (plan, review, security, test, deploy) plus the cross-cutting skills every project uses.

plugins.name: ccds-ai
plugins.description: AI / LLM application domain specialist. Ships the ai-architect agent and 6 ai-* skills it composes.

plugins.name: ccds-dataplat
plugins.description: Data Platform domain specialist. Ships the dataplat-architect agent and 7 dataplat-* skills it composes.

plugins.name: ccds-desktop
plugins.description: Desktop App domain specialist. Ships the desktop-architect agent and 5 desktop-* skills it composes.

plugins.name: ccds-devtool
plugins.description: DevTool / CLI / Library domain specialist. Ships the devtool-architect agent and 5 devtool-* skills it composes.

plugins.name: ccds-ecom
plugins.description: E-commerce domain specialist. Ships the ecom-architect agent and 6 ecom-* skills it composes.

plugins.name: ccds-embed
plugins.description: Embedded / IoT domain specialist. Ships the embed-architect agent and 6 embed-* skills it composes.

plugins.name: ccds-ext
plugins.description: Browser extension domain specialist. Ships the ext-architect agent and 4 ext-* skills it composes.

plugins.name: ccds-fintech
plugins.description: Fintech domain specialist. Ships the fintech-architect agent and 4 fintech-* skills it composes.

plugins.name: ccds-game
plugins.description: Game domain specialist. Ships the game-architect agent and 8 game-* skills it composes.

plugins.name: ccds-infra
plugins.description: Infrastructure / dev-platform domain specialist. Ships the infra-architect agent and 7 infra-* skills it composes.

plugins.name: ccds-media
plugins.description: Media / streaming domain specialist. Ships the media-architect agent and 6 media-* skills it composes.

plugins.name: ccds-mobile
plugins.description: Mobile domain specialist. Ships the mobile-architect agent and 6 mobile-* skills it composes.

plugins.name: ccds-orch
plugins.description: Agent / orchestration domain specialist. Ships the orch-architect agent and 4 orch-* skills it composes.

plugins.name: ccds-saas
plugins.description: SaaS domain specialist. Ships the saas-architect agent and 5 saas-* skills it composes.
